use_cases: Primary CTA button with Spider-Verse-inspired glitch effects for creative and branding contexts
Interactive hover-activated button for landing pages and hero sections
Call-to-action element for entertainment, media, and developer tool applications
Visual accent button for portfolios and creative showcases
ai_summary: A visually striking button component featuring Spider-Verse-inspired glitch effects with dual cyan and magenta color layers that animate on hover. The button sits on a dark stone background and uses CSS keyframe animations to create a chromatic aberration effect with noise and slice overlays. Perfect for creative portfolios, media sites, or any application needing bold interactive elements.
